summary: T-Mobile suffered a data breach that exposed sensitive customer information, including Social Security numbers and driver's license numbers. The breach was discovered in January 2023. An investigation found that the breach was caused by a malicious third-party actor.
title: Data Breach Notification

summary: T-Mobile suffered a data breach that exposed sensitive customer information, including Social Security numbers and driver's license numbers. The breach was discovered in January 2023. An investigation found that the breach was caused by a hacker who gained access to T-Mobile's systems through a third-party vendor.
title: Data Breach Notification
